{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322200121BDB542AF1AD5A9697F55"}"},"total":201},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7566427410981126936","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"多更点，快点更，看不够，我是追着文野同人文发现的这篇文的，还是希望快点到文野相关的内容，宰厨希望宰快点登场"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761699310,"group_id":"7557032614108875838","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3103274005444361"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7557032614108875838","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"9"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":13823,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7558902762224239384","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错，看出来了故事会很严谨，文笔也很好，我很期待，就是太少了，想养一养。
不过我真的很看好作者，这样写下去一定会有成绩的，只要不断更。
我在想会不会有咒回的人获得神之眼(由愿望而不是欲望的神之眼)，不然的话我觉得实力不匹配，而且原神角色那么多，还有结局会不会反转回去，虽然这样会有趣，刺激，但我对这些角色都是有爱的，还是不希望他们从头到尾都是反派，受到审讨
不过具有怎么写就看作者啦，只要每个角色都有自己的魅力和故事，那我就觉得很好了，我就会很喜欢，如果是这样的人物，那么结局什么的怎么可能差呢","text_exts":[{"e":11,"s":8,"text":"故事会","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%95%85%E4%BA%8B%E4%BC%9A&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774180881A9697F55%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227558902762224239384%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227557032614108875838%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%95%85%E4%BA%8B%E4%BC%9A%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1759948623,"group_id":"7557032614108875838","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzqmbJvgklQwO4eP35fPdpXVSCnhdcpvwbbKBSNJMfkM","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"3103274005444361","user_name":"用户31032740"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3103274005444361","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7557032614108875838","book_info":{"abstract":"#ooc私设警告！反转版本提瓦特
【无cp】
旅行者荧不小心穿到了综漫，为了回家，她签了个角色扮演系统。
但这角色卡是不是有问题？
什么叫魔神并不爱人？
什么叫魔神是来自深渊的？

————
当提瓦特众人的立场反转，当坎瑞亚变成了地表文明，当天理成为漆黑命运，当魔神成为深渊的一部分，这一切究竟会变成什么模样？
综漫世界观下的众人开始面对来自深渊的可怕魔神。
咒回：咒术界惨遭任性的自由之神玩弄；
文野：横滨变成了璃月治下的租界；
鬼灭：神樱树在千年前破土而出；
柯南——须弥
jojo5×家教——枫丹
圣杯战争——纳塔
